title: 外卖
description_uz: «Yetkazib berish qulay-ku, lekin foydalimi?» — Ikki do'st yetkazib berishga buyurtma berish, sog'lik va pul sarfi haqida bahslashadi. Bu dialog odatlar haqida so'rash, sabab keltirish va taqqoslashni mashq qiladi — qulaylik, narx va sog'lom ovqatlanish. Ish hayotiga oid amaliy so'zlarga boy. Tinglash va rol o'ynash orqali ravon gapirishni mustahkamlash uchun ajoyib.
description_ru: «Доставка удобна, конечно, но полезна ли она?» — Двое друзей обсуждают заказ доставки, здоровье и траты на еду. Диалог тренирует расспросы о привычках, приведение причин и сравнение — удобство, цена и здоровое питание. Богат практичной лексикой о рабочих буднях. Отлично подходит для аудирования и ролевой игры, чтобы закрепить беглую речь.
description_en: «Delivery is convenient, sure, but is it healthy?» — Two friends debate ordering delivery, health, and how much they spend on food. The dialogue practices asking about habits, giving reasons, and comparing—convenience, price, and healthy eating. Rich in practical work-life vocabulary. Great for listening and role-play to lock in fluent speech.

sentences.text_translation_en: What are you having for lunch?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我不想做饭，打算点外卖。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ bù xiǎng zuò fàn, dǎsuàn diǎn wàimài.
sentences.text_translation: Ovqat tayyorlagim kelmayapti, yetkazib berishga buyurtma bermoqchiman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Готовить не хочется, собираюсь заказать доставку.
sentences.text_translation_en: I don't feel like cooking, so I'm going to order delivery.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 一周三四次吧，工作太忙没时间做饭。
sentences.pinyin: Yì zhōu sān sì cì ba, gōngzuò tài máng méi shíjiān zuò fàn.
sentences.text_translation: Haftasiga uch-to'rt marta, ish juda band, ovqat tayyorlashga vaqt yo'q.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Раза три-четыре в неделю — работы много, готовить некогда.
sentences.text_translation_en: Three or four times a week — work's too busy, no time to cook.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 外卖方便是方便，但是健康吗？
sentences.pinyin: Wàimài fāngbiàn shì fāngbiàn, dànshì jiànkāng ma?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Доставка удобна, конечно, но полезна ли она?
sentences.text_translation_en: Delivery is convenient, sure, but is it healthy?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 确实不太健康，油和盐都比较多。
sentences.pinyin: Quèshí bú tài jiànkāng, yóu hé yán dōu bǐjiào duō.
sentences.text_translation: Rostdan ham unchalik foydali emas, yog' ham, tuz ham ko'p bo'ladi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Действительно не очень полезна, и масла, и соли довольно много.
sentences.text_translation_en: It really isn't very healthy — there's quite a lot of oil and salt.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 那你为什么不自己带饭？
sentences.pinyin: Nà nǐ wèishénme bú zìjǐ dài fàn?
sentences.text_translation: Unda nega o'zing ovqat olib bormaysan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Тогда почему ты не берёшь еду с собой?
sentences.text_translation_en: Then why don't you bring your own food?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 有时候会带，但是早上起不来，没时间准备。
sentences.pinyin: Yǒu shíhou huì dài, dànshì zǎoshang qǐ bù lái, méi shíjiān zhǔnbèi.
sentences.text_translation: Ba'zan olib boraman, lekin ertalab uyqudan turolmayman, tayyorlashga vaqt bo'lmaydi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Иногда беру, но утром не могу встать, нет времени готовить.
sentences.text_translation_en: Sometimes I do, but I can't get up in the morning and have no time to prepare it.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 米饭、炒菜或者面条，偶尔也会点饺子。
sentences.pinyin: Mǐfàn, chǎocài huòzhě miàntiáo, ǒu'ěr yě huì diǎn jiǎozi.
sentences.text_translation: Guruch, qovurilgan taom yoki lag'mon, ba'zan chuchvara ham buyurtma qilaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Рис, жареные блюда или лапшу, иногда заказываю пельмени.
sentences.text_translation_en: Rice, stir-fried dishes or noodles, and occasionally dumplings too.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ yòng shénme ruǎnjiàn diǎn wàimài?
sentences.text_translation: Qaysi ilova orqali yetkazib berish buyurtma qilasan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Через какое приложение ты заказываешь доставку?
sentences.text_translation_en: Which app do you use to order delivery?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我用美团和饿了么，哪个优惠多就用哪个。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ yòng Měituán hé Èleme, nǎ ge yōuhuì duō jiù yòng nǎ ge.
sentences.text_translation: Meituan va Eleme'dan foydalanaman, qaysisida chegirma ko'p bo'lsa, o'shanidan.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Пользуюсь Meituan и Eleme, у кого больше скидок — тем и пользуюсь.
sentences.text_translation_en: I use Meituan and Eleme — whichever has more discounts is the one I use.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Wàimài yìbān duō jiǔ néng dào?
sentences.text_translation: Yetkazib berish odatda qancha vaqtda keladi?
sentences.text_translation_en: How long does delivery usually take?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 三四十分钟左右，高峰期可能会慢一些。
sentences.pinyin: Sān sìshí fēnzhōng zuǒyòu, gāofēngqī kěnéng huì màn yì xiē.
sentences.text_translation: Taxminan o'ttiz-qirq daqiqa, gavjum vaqtlarda biroz sekinroq bo'lishi mumkin.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Около тридцати-сорока минут, в час пик может быть чуть медленнее.
sentences.text_translation_en: About thirty to forty minutes; during peak hours it can be a bit slower.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 那你每天花多少钱在吃上？
sentences.pinyin: Nà nǐ měitiān huā duōshao qián zài chī shàng?
sentences.text_translation: Unda har kuni ovqatga qancha pul sarflaysan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: А сколько ты тратишь на еду каждый день?
sentences.text_translation_en: So how much do you spend on food each day?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 午餐和晚餐加起来大概六七十块。
sentences.pinyin: Wǔcān hé wǎncān jiā qǐlái dàgài liù qīshí kuài.
sentences.text_translation: Tushlik va kechki ovqat birga taxminan oltmish-yetmish yuan.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Обед и ужин вместе — примерно шестьдесят-семьдесят юаней.
sentences.text_translation_en: Lunch and dinner together come to about sixty or seventy yuan.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 那一个月下来不少钱啊！
sentences.pinyin: Nà yí ge yuè xiàlái bùshǎo qián a!
sentences.text_translation: Unda bir oyda anchagina pul bo'ladi-ku!
sentences.text_translation_ru: Так за месяц набегает немало денег!
sentences.text_translation_en: That adds up to quite a lot over a month!
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 是啊，所以我打算以后尽量少点外卖。
sentences.pinyin: Shì a, suǒyǐ wǒ dǎsuàn yǐhòu jǐnliàng shǎo diǎn wàimài.
sentences.text_translation: Ha-da, shuning uchun bundan keyin iloji boricha kamroq yetkazib berish buyurtma qilmoqchiman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Да, поэтому впредь я собираюсь как можно реже заказывать доставку.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yeah, so from now on I plan to order delivery as little as possible.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation: To'g'ri, pul ham tejaladi, sog'liq uchun ham foydali.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Верно, и деньги экономишь, и полезнее для здоровья.
sentences.text_translation_en: Right — it saves money and it's healthier.
sentences.speaker: A
